finding: Root cause analysis (ses_1887e9d51ffe): All 5 hypotheses confirmed — (1) HIGH BLOCKER: github-ipc.ts missing, (2) HIGH: 60+ magic strings, (3) HIGH: APP_IDS duplicated, (4) MEDIUM: process.env.HOME in apps.ts, (5) MEDIUM: homedir() in migrate.ts. Build-breaking defect confirmed: ipc.ts:19 import will fail at compile time.
repair_path: Already addressed in plan revision 4 — Wave A creates github-ipc.ts as step 3, resolve order enforced.

finding: Preload purity: ipc-channels.ts will be imported in sandboxed renderer (windows.ts lines 155-158: sandbox: true). If ipc-channels.ts accidentally imports electron or node, preload crashes at runtime with no fallback. Post-creation verification required.
repair_path: Addressed: plan revision 4 step 1 includes rg verification. Executor must run 'rg from "(electron|node:)' ipc-channels.ts" after creation.

finding: Overall verdict: SAFE. No new data races, no shared mutable state, no memory leaks introduced. The as const registry is immutable per-instance. All app.getPath('home') call sites fire after app.whenReady(). Confirmed by tracing call chains through IPC handlers.

Validation strategy designed: 24 assertions across 11 groups, bisect-compatible at each wave boundary. Key insight: bun test cannot import Electron native modules — new validation script must use static analysis (rg/parse) not runtime imports. Existing ipc.test.ts uses inline mocks.
repair_path: Integrated into plan revision 4 as 13-step validation checklist with bisect checkpoints per wave.

finding: Plan channel counts are systematically wrong. Plan claims '43 ipcRenderer.invoke' in preload — actual is 56. Plan claims '7 on/removeListener' — actual is 6 unique (12 call sites). Plan claims '49 ipcMain.handle' — actual is 50. Preload work underestimated by ~33%.
repair_path: Correct channel counts in execution plan: preload/index.ts has 56 invoke + 4 send + 12 on/removeListener references = ~72 magic strings total. ipc.ts has 50 handle + 4 on = 54 references.

finding: Rollback plan uses 'git checkout -- <files>' on dirty files (ipc.ts, windows.ts, preload/index.ts) which would destroy uncommitted work from other agents (82-line GitHub OAuth extraction, 18-line windows.ts changes, deleteCustomAgent addition).
repair_path: Add 'git stash push -m "pre-plan-dirty-state" -- packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts packages/desktop/src/main/windows.ts packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts' as the first rollback step to preserve dirty state before checkout.

finding: Test impact claim is overstated. ipc.test.ts and store.test.ts use self-contained mock registries with local string literals from pattern-testing — they DO NOT import from production code. Channel string replacement in production code will NOT break them. But conversely, there are zero tests verifying actual channel name correctness.
repair_path: Remove 'tests will break' claim from risk table. Add follow-up: create integration tests for IPC channel name correctness against registry.
